caption: A man with dark skin, wearing glasses and a white long-sleeved shirt with a small red and white patterned bowtie, is speaking in a studio setting. He wears a tall, grey, pointed wig on his head and black headphones over his ears. He is positioned in front of a black microphone on a boom arm. The background is a wall adorned with several framed photographs and some clothing items. To his right, a white box and a black bag are visible. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appears on the left and right sides of the screen, with the word "PODCAST" positioned below the main text. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and slightly shifting his facial expressions and head posture.
